short.en: ESP32 + auger servo dispenses a measured portion on schedule, with manual override on the web UI.
short.sl: ESP32 + servo s polžem dozira odmerjeno količino po urniku, z ročno prevoženjem prek spletne aplikacije.

description.en: PETG hopper feeds a printed auger driven by a 270° digital servo; one rotation = ~7 g of dry food, calibrated by weighing 10 cycles. ESP32 hosts a small captive web UI on the LAN with a cron-style schedule and Telegram notifications when food runs low (LDR under the hopper).
description.sl: PETG bunker oskrbuje natisnjen polž, ki ga poganja 270° digitalni servo; en obrat = ~7 g suhe hrane, umerjeno s tehtanjem 10 ciklov. ESP32 ponuja preprost spletni vmesnik v lokalnem omrežju z urnikom in obvestili prek Telegrama, ko hrana poide (LDR pod bunkerjem).
